name: PineScript MCP Server
what_it_does: PineScript MCP server enabling AI agents to work with TradingView's PineScript language — generating, validating, and analyzing PineScript code for custom technical indicators and trading strategies, accessing PineScript documentation, and integrating AI-assisted PineScript development into trading analysis workflows.
use_cases: Generating PineScript indicators from natural language descriptions from trading agents
Debugging PineScript code with AI assistance from development agents
Converting trading strategies to PineScript implementations from strategy agents
Accessing PineScript documentation and examples from coding agents
Code review and optimization of PineScript strategies from quality agents
Learning PineScript syntax with AI guidance from educational agents
not_for: Live trading execution (PineScript runs on TradingView, not for live orders)
best_when: A TradingView user develops PineScript indicators or strategies and wants AI assistance — generating, debugging, and optimizing PineScript code for technical analysis.
avoid_when: You don't use TradingView or need live trading execution rather than indicator development.

auth.notes: No authentication — primarily works with PineScript documentation and code generation. TradingView account not strictly required for code generation.

pricing.paid_tiers: None for MCP; TradingView subscription for live chart execution
pricing.notes: Community MCP is free. TradingView account (free or paid) needed to run generated PineScript.

known_agent_gotchas: PineScript execution requires TradingView — generated code must be manually pasted
PineScript v5 vs v4 differences — verify version used in generation
Community MCP from individual contributor — limited documentation
AI-generated PineScript must be validated on TradingView before use
Trading strategies generated by AI should be backtested carefully before live use
PineScript API may change with TradingView updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local documentation access. No credentials. Community MCP. AI-generated trading strategies carry financial risk — always validate before use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local access. No credentials. Community MCP. Validate AI-generated trading strategies carefully.
